DATE	DURATION	TEMPO RANGE	FOCUS AREA	MOOD	NOTES	
Nov 09 · 21:42	52:18	88 → 96 bpm	Sight reading	🔥	Carcassi No. 7 clicked at 92 — finally clean through bar 24.	

Nov 08 · 22:05	38:44	76 → 84 bpm	D minor scales	🙂	Sluggish left hand on the third octave; right hand felt grounded.	

Nov 07 · 21:58	44:02	80 → 92 bpm	Tremolo	😌	Slow practice paid off — even pulse for two minutes straight.	

Nov 06 · 22:14	29:51	72 → 80 bpm	Barre · pos. V	😐	Thumb cramp on bar 4. Cut session short, stretched, called it.	

Nov 05 · 21:30	61:07	84 → 100 bpm	Arpeggio · p-i-m-a	🤩	Villa-Lobos Étude No. 1 hit tempo for the first time. Recorded take.	

Nov 04 · 22:02	40:23	76 → 88 bpm	Rest stroke i-m	🙂	Nails reshaped before — tone noticeably rounder on the second string.	

Nov 03 · 21:48	47:36	80 → 92 bpm	Dynamics	😌	Worked the mp→ff swell in Tárrega; arm tension lessened by the third pass.	

Nov 02 · 22:20	33:19	68 → 76 bpm	Sight reading	😴	Tired evening. Played slow, read through Sor Op. 35 Nos. 17–19.
